Why are you interested in working at Suno?
Suno is an in person company and currently expects employees to work from the office five days per week. We believe being together in person is an important part of our culture, collaboration, and creativity, and we prioritize in office presence as a core part of how we work. Suno reserves the right to update these expectations as needed. We will consider requests for accommodation to this policy and, upon request, will work with employees to explore reasonable accommodations for physical or mental disabilities or for other reasons recognized by applicable law. Please confirm that you have read and understand Suno’s in office expectations and policy.
